wiki.products: Sports, games, fashion accessories, bath and body, candy and beverages, room décor and storage, stationery and school supplies, books, smartphone accessories, novelty and gag items, seasonal items
wiki.extract: Five Below, Inc. is an American chain of specialty discount gift shops that prices most of its products at up to $5, plus a smaller assortment of products priced up to $40. Founded in 2002 by Tom Vellios and David Schlessinger and headquartered in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, the chain is aimed at tweens and teens. By 2014, there were more than 1,850 stores located across the United States.

recalls.reason: Alcohol fuel can splash or leak out of the fire pit reservoir during use and/or ignition, causing a flash fire that can spread and create larger hotter flames that can escape the unit, presenting risk of serious burn injury from flame jetting and fire hazards.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

sampleRecords.nature: Open wounds involving internal organs, major blood vessels
sampleRecords.event_description: Stabbing, cutting, slashing by other person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was acting in a loss prevention capacity when they were stabbed in the abdomen with a knife by an individual. The employee sustained multiple stab wounds, one of which punctured his lung. Part of the knife broke off in his body, requiring surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  during maintenance, cleaning, testing
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was performing maintenance on the conveyor line. Their right arm was caught in the conveyor resulting in multiple arm fractures.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was descending a ladder when they fell to the ground. The employee was hospitalized with a broken left ankle, a sprained back, and broken ribs.

sampleRecords.event_description: Part of occupant s body caught between vehicle and other object in nonroadway transport incident
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was operating a forklift when it ran into storage racks. Her left foot was caught between the forklift and a rack. The foot was broken and toes were amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping over an object
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was stepping over a guardrail, tripped and fell resulting in a broken right arm.

sampleRecalls.title: Five Below Recalls Tabletop Fire Pits Due to Risk of Serious Burn Injury from Flame Jetting and Fire Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves two models of tabletop fire pits, one with a smooth black base and one with a beveled gray base. Both include a stainless-steel fuel cup, a lid and a flame cover. The smooth black fire pits come in blue, yellow and white box packaging with "Tabletop Fire Pit" printed in white lettering on the fron…
hazards: Alcohol fuel can splash or leak out of the fire pit reservoir during use and/or ignition, causing a flash fire that can spread and create larger hotter flames …
injuries: Five Below has received one report of flames escaping from a tabletop firepit. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Five Below Recalls Room2Room LED Iridescent Bear Lights Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Room2Room LED iridescent bear lights. The lights measure about 7.5 inches tall by 9.3 inches wide and have a USB plug with an on/off switch. "Room 2 Room," "LED Iridescent Bear Light" and model number "LD-0030" are on a sticker on the bottom of the bear. The UPC code "1922340368444" is printed…
hazards: The power switch on the USB cord can overheat and melt, posing fire and burn hazards.
injuries: The firm has received 28 reports of the USB cord overheating and melting, including six reports of burns to fingers. There were also two reports of property damage, including burns to a wall and a he…

sampleRecalls.title: DGL Group Recalls Vibe USB Mobile Power Bars Due to Fire Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Five Below
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Vibe USB mobile power bars also known as portable USB power supply or portable chargers. The power bars were sold in black, white, blue, green, pink and purple. The rectangular-shaped power bars measure one square inch by three inches long and have a cord with key ring attached at the end. "Power …
hazards: The power bar can overheat, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: DGL Group has received six reports of incidents involving melted parts, smoking, leaking batteries and fire resulting in reports of bursting power bars and minor property damage. No injuries have bee…

sampleRecalls.title: Atico International USA Recalls Halloween Mini Projection Lights Due to Burn Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Five Below
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves plastic Halloween mini projection lights. They are about 6 inches long and have Halloween-themed black designs on them. They were sold in orange, green and purple. The projection lights came in a cardboard blister pack with a purple background. The phrase "Ghouloween" is printed on the upper left-…
hazards: The mini projection lights can overheat and melt, posing a burn hazard to consumers.
injuries: Atico International USA has received two reports of incidents, including one minor burn injury.
